children.heading: Jurisdiction to maintain a registry
children.label: a Jurisdiction to maintain a registry
children.text: Each jurisdiction shall maintain a jurisdiction-wide sex offender registry conforming to the requirements of this subchapter.

children.heading: Guidelines and regulations
children.label: b Guidelines and regulations
children.text: The Attorney General shall issue guidelines and regulations to interpret and implement this subchapter.
